ReportDefinitionEN: Finance brokers in Italy operate as intermediaries between clients seeking financial products and institutions providing loans, mortgages, leasing, and investment products.
MarketingDefinitionEN: Italian finance brokers connect businesses and consumers with optimal financial products including loans, mortgages, leasing and investment vehicles.
KeywordsIncludeEN: finance broker, financial intermediary, mortgage broker, loan broker, credit broker
KeywordsIncludeIT: mediatore finanziario, intermediario finanziario, mediatore mutui
TradeAssociations: ASSOFIN - Associazione Italiana del Credito al Consumo e Immobiliare
AdjacentIndustries: Banking, Insurance, Investment Management, Accounting Services
